mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_help_article_type t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.name},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.isDeleted},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM castle_help_article_type t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.name},'%')
AND t.remark like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.remark},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{castleHelpArticleTypeEntity.isDeleted},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM castle_help_article_type t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.* FROM castle_help_article_type t left join castle_help_article t1 on t.id = t1.type_id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 and t1.is_deleted = 2 and t.status = 1 and t1.status = 1
and (t1.title like concat('%', #{title} ,'%') or t.name like concat('%', #{title} ,'%'))
group by t.id order by t.create_time desc
